zh.lifeSummary: 當John Shatswell III於1552年出生在英國素福爾可易普斯維其時，他的父親John Shatswell II27歲，母親Judith Clapp27歲。他於1573年與Joanna Webster在英國英格蘭素福爾可易普斯維其結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1646年2月11日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可易普斯維其享年94歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾希爾莫頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Shatswell III于1552年出生在英国素福爾可易普斯維其时，他的父亲John Shatswell II27岁，母亲Judith Clapp27岁。他于1573年与Joanna Webster在英国英格兰素福爾可易普斯維其结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1646年2月11日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可易普斯維其享年94岁，埋葬在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾希爾莫頓。

nameMeanings.name: Shatswell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: possibly a habitational name froma lost or unidentified place.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When John Shatswell III was born in 1552, in Ipswich, Suffolk, England, his father, John Shatswell II, was 27 and his mother, Judith Clapp, was 27. He married Joanna Webster in 1573, in Ipswich, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 11 February 1646, in Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 94, and was buried in Hillmorton, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Shatswell III est né en 1552, à Ipswich, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John Shatswell II, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Judith Clapp, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Joanna Webster en 1573, à Ipswich, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 11 février 1646, à Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 94 ans, et a été enterré à Hillmorton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Shatswell III 1552 in Ipswich, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Shatswell II 27 und seine Mutter Judith Clapp 27. Er hat 1573 in Ipswich, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Joanna Webster geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 11. Februar 1646 im Alter von 94 Jahren in Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Hillmorton, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Shatswell III è nato il nel 1552 nel Ipswich, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, John Shatswell II, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Judith Clapp, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Joanna Webster nel 1573, nel Ipswich, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 11 febbraio 1646, nel Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 94 anni, e fu sepolto a Hillmorton, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Shatswell IIIが1552年にイギリススフォルクイプスウィチで生まれた時，父John Shatswell IIは27歳，母Judith Clappは27歳であった。1573年にイギリスイギリススフォルクイプスウィチでJoanna Websterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1646年2月11日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスイプスウィチで94歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアヒルモートンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Shatswell III(이)가 1552년 영국 수폴크 이프스위치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Shatswell II(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Judith Clapp(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1573년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 이프스위치에서 Joanna Webster(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1646년 2월 11일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 이프스위치에서 94세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 힐모르턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Shatswell III nasceu em 1552, em Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Shatswell II, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Judith Clapp, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Joanna Webster em 1573, em Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 11 de fevereiro de 1646, em Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 94 anos, e foi sepultado em Hillmorton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Shatswell III родился в 1552 г. в местности ипсвич, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John Shatswell II было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Judith Clapp, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Joanna Webster в 1573 г. в местности ипсвич, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 11 февраля 1646 г. в местности ипсвич, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 94 лет и был похоронен в местности хиллмортон, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Shatswell III nació en 1552, en Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John Shatswell II, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Judith Clapp, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Joanna Webster en 1573, en Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 11 de febrero de 1646, en Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 94 años, y fue sepultado en Hillmorton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
